tools.name: devexpress_docs_search
tools.description:
Search DevExpress documentation for a given technology and a question.
If you want to search for multiple technologies, pass them as a list.
This tool returns only snippets/excerpts; full content requires a follow-up `devexpress_docs_get_content` call on a chosen URL.
ALWAYS call `devexpress_docs_se

tools.name: devexpress_docs_get_content
tools.description:
Get full document content by URL from DevExpress documentation.
Use this tool to retrieve the complete markdown content of a specific documentation page.
PREREQUISITE: ALWAYS call `devexpress_docs_search` before using this tool to get valid URLs.
The URL parameter must be obtained from the results o

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "devexpress_docs_get_content" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Get full document content by URL from DevExpress documentation. Use this tool to retrieve the complete markdown content of a specific documentation page. PREREQ…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.
